componentDescription: A visual divider component to separate content with various styles and orientations.

orientation.description: Defines the orientation of the separator, either horizontal or vertical.

variant.description: Specifies the visual variant of the separator, such as solid, dashed, or dotted.

thickness.description: Sets the thickness of the separator line.

color.description: Determines the color of the separator line.

spacing.description: Controls the space around the separator.

label.description: Provides content to be displayed within or alongside the separator, often text or an icon.

decorative.description: Indicates whether the separator is purely decorative (true) or has semantic meaning (false).

views.description: Allows for custom styling of different parts of the separator component.
